song.title: He Died for Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) He died for me that I might live; I live for Him who died, My life, my love to Him I give— Jesus, the Crucified.
[C] Chorus O Jesus, my Lord and Savior, Help me to fully follow Thee In life and death and loving service, As Thou hast lived and died for me.
[V2] 2) He died for me that I might die To Satan, self, and sin; O death so deep! O life so high! Help me to enter in.
[V3] 3) He lives for me that I may live As spotless e’en as He; Savior, to me Thy nature give, And live Thy life in me.
[V4] 4) He lives for me that I may give His love to hearts that pine; Let me like Him for others live, And trace His steps divine.
song.author: Albert B. Simpson
